responses.summary: Tightened tests/test-cli.sh:test_update_skill_migration_is_non_destructive so condition (3) also rejects destructive verbs beyond dedup: 'replace permissions.allow', 'overwrite permissions.allow', 'replace/overwrite list', 'clear permissions.allow', 'drop all entries', 'discard entries'. The 'drop the legacy allowedTools key' phrase is NOT matched (targeted anti-pattern list). Negative control: reintroducing 'replace permissions.allow with allowedTools' fails the test; reintroducing 'union the two lists (dedup)' still fails the test; both restore clean at 70/70.
